perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a green t-shirt, glasses, and a grey flat cap is sitting at a table with a white Apple Watch box. He opens the box and shows the watch to the camera. (2) The video cuts to a close-up comparison of two Apple Watches (Ultra 3 and Ultra 2) side-by-side on a textured surface. (3) Transitions to shots of watch bands (blue and green) being held up and then worn on the wrist. (4) Close-ups follow showing a charging cable being attached to the watch and various health data screens displayed on a smartphone and the watch itself.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in an enthusiastic and fast-paced tone, accompanied by upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music. (2) The music remains constant as the narrator provides a detailed comparison of the watch models, with slight volume ducking to prioritize the vocals. (3) Soft digital sound effects (swooshes and pings) occur during text overlays and scene transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我的 Apple Watch Ultra 3' - Hook text indicating the subject. (2) '1.98吋 vs 1.92吋' - Functional text providing screen size measurements. (3) '0~80% Ultra 3 只要45分鐘' - Functional text explaining charging speed. (4) '呼吸中止症' - Decorative hook text highlighting a specific health feature.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Unboxing -> Feature-by-Feature Comparison -> Health App Demo -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator acting as the presenter throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a green Roots Athletics t-shirt, a grey flat cap, and circular glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio setting with soundproofing foam panels on the wall and a textured tabletop for product shots.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Specs Comparison -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote the Apple Watch Ultra 3 by highlighting its hardware upgrades (screen size, charging speed) and software capabilities (health tracking) in direct comparison to the previous generation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation and review of a specific tech product with brand logo clearly visible.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature flat cap and '3c Tim' logo in the corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Professional tech influencer content characterized by fast editing and dense information delivery.
